name: Ashish Vaswani
key_contributions: Lead author of "Attention Is All You Need" (2017) — introduced the Transformer architecture
Co-founded Essential AI after leaving Google
The Transformer is the single most consequential architectural innovation in modern AI
summary: Ashish Vaswani is the lead author of the paper that changed everything. 'Attention Is All You Need' (2017) introduced the Transformer architecture, which replaced recurrence with self-attention and enabled the massive parallelization that makes modern LLMs possible. Every frontier model — GPT, Claude, Gemini, LLaMA — descends from this architecture. After Google, Vaswani co-founded Essential AI to build enterprise AI products.
